props.name: scrollbar
props.docs: Specifies the box’s snap position as an alignment of its snap area

props.name: snap
props.docs: Specifies the box’s snap position as an alignment of its snap area

styles.name: --mds-horizontal-scroll-background
styles.docs: Sets the background-color of the component

styles.name: --mds-horizontal-scroll-scrollbar-margin
styles.docs: Sets the margin of the browser scroll bar (if supported)

styles.name: --mds-horizontal-scroll-scrollbar-radius
styles.docs: Sets the border-radius of the browser scroll bar (if supported)

styles.name: --mds-horizontal-scroll-scrollbar-size
styles.docs: Sets the height and width of the browser scroll bar (if supported)

styles.name: --mds-horizontal-scroll-scrollbar-thumb-background
styles.docs: Sets the background-color of the browser scroll bar thumb (if supported)

styles.name: --mds-horizontal-scroll-scrollbar-track-background
styles.docs: Sets the background-color of the browser scroll bar track (if supported)
